title: Item
description: An Item represents a product or service that a company buys, sells, or re-sells. Items are used in line items on invoices, sales receipts, bills, and other transactions.

Name.description: Name of the item. Must be unique within the same type.

Description.description: Description of the item used in sales transactions

PurchaseDesc.description: Description of the item used in purchase transactions

Active.description: Whether the item is currently active

FullyQualifiedName.description: Fully qualified name of the item

Taxable.description: Whether sales of this item are taxable

SalesTaxIncluded.description: Whether the sales tax is included in the item amount

QtyOnHand.description: Current quantity on hand (inventory items only)

InvStartDate.description: Date of opening balance for inventory items

TrackQtyOnHand.description: Whether quantity on hand is tracked

Level.description: Depth level in the item hierarchy
